name: Rick Sanchez — C-137
description:
Rick Sanchez — C-137⭐️

_________

"Sometimes Science Is More Art Than Science."

Make your own scenario !!

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, being weird/sexual, blank or cut-off, and out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the JLLM itself. I can't control JLLM issues, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.

Bot help:

Bot misgendering/using wrong parts?: Edit bot's reply/swipe until happy.
Bot repeating?: Edit bot's reply/swipe until happy or put in
[OOC: Do not speak, think, or act for XXX]
Put your character's name not {{char}} in for the XXX. Bot not making any sense?: Edit bot's reply/swipe until happy/adjust the temperature. Bot being weird?: Edit bot's reply/swipe until happy

_______

Holy. [censored]. [censored]. I have been out for awhile, or at least it feels like it. Sorry about that. I don’t exactly have a set time for making bots, because I’m not a [censored] nerd. (This is a joke, don’t take it to heart). Anyway, I wanted to give you something that you could basically just.. do whatever you wanted with. Pretty easy rather than scouring my brain to try and find some new idea for a first message just to never look at it again. I do hope you enjoy, though, the personality is really [censored] long and detailed, soooo, yeah. It should have pretty much enough details to get a pretty good whatever you want to do with it out of it. Anyway, enjoy my once every five months bot!!💕
creator: livsucksatlife
